title: Maa Banglamukhi Chalisa
intro: Shri Banglamukhi Chalisa: Full Path, Meaning, and Benefits - Hymn to Goddess Banglamukhi
description:
॥ Doha ॥
  Sir navai Baglamukhi, likhun Chalisa aaj.
  Kripa karahu mopar sada, puran ho mam kaaj.
  
  ॥ Chaupai ॥
  Jai Jai Jai Shri Bagla Mata,
  Aadishakti sab jag ki trata.
  Bagla sam tab aanan Mata,
  Ehi te bhayau naam vikhyata.
  Shashi lalaat kundal chhavi nyari,
  Astuti karahin dev nar-nari.
  Peetvasan tan par tav rajai,
  Haathahin mudgar gada virajai.
  Teen nayan gal champak mala,
  Amit tej prakatat hai bhala.
  Ratna-jatit sinhasan sohai,
  Shobha nirakhi sakal jan mohai.
  Aasan peetvarna maharani,
  Bhaktan ki tum ho vardani.
  Peetabhushan peetahin chandan,
  Sur nar naag karat sab vandan.
  Ehi vidhi dhyan hriday mein rakhai,
  Ved puran sant as bhakhai.
  Ab puja vidhi karaun prakasha,
  Jaake kiye hot dukh-nasha.
  Prathamahin peet dhwaja faharavai,
  Peetvasan devi pahiravai.
  Kunkum akshat modak besan,
  Abir gulal supari chandan.
  Malya haridra aru phal pana,
  Sabahin chadhai dharai ur dhyana.
  Dhoop deep karpur ki bati,
  Prem-sahit tab karai aarti.
  Astuti karai haath dou jore,
  Puravahu matu manorath more.
  Matu bhagati tab sab sukh khani,
  Karahun kripa mopar janjani.
  Trividh taap sab dukh nashavahu,
  Timir mitakar gyan badhavahu.
  Baar-baar main binavahu tohin,
  Aviral bhagati gyan do mohin.
  Pujanant mein havan karavai,
  Sa nar manvanchhit phal pavai.
  Sarshap hom karai jo koi,
  Taake vash sacharachar hoi.
  Til tandul sang ksheer miravai,
  Bhagati prem se havan karavai.
  Dukh daridra vyapai nahin soi,
  Nishchay sukh-sampatti sab hoi.
  Phool ashok havan jo karai,
  Taake grih sukh-sampatti bharai.
  Phal semar ka hom karijai,
  Nishchay vaako ripu sab chhijai.
  Guggul ghrit homai jo koi,
  Tehi ke vash mein raja hoi.
  Guggul til sang hom karavai,
  Taako sakal bandh kat javai.
  Beelakshar ka paath jo karahin,
  Beej mantra tumharo uchharahin.
  Ek maas nishi jo kar japa,
  Tehi kar mitat sakal santapa.
  Ghar ki shuddh bhumi jahan hoi,
  Sadhka jaap karai tahan soi.
  Sei ichchhit phal nishchay pavai,
  Yaamai nahin kadu sanshay lavai.
  Athava teer nadi ke jaai,
  Sadhak jaap karai man laai.
  Das sahasra jap karai jo koi,
  Sak kaaj tehi kar sidhi hoi.
  Jaap karai jo lakshahin bara,
  Taakar hoy suyeshvistara.
  Jo tav naam japai man laai,
  Alpakaal mahan ripuhin nasai.
  Saptaratri jo paapahin nama,
  Vaako puran ho sab kama.
  Nav din jaap kare jo koi,
  Vyadhi rahit taakar tan hoi.
  Dhyan karai jo bandhya nari,
  Pavai putradik phal chari.
  Pratah sayam aru madhyana,
  Dhare dhyan hovakalyana.
  Kahan lagi mahima kahaun tihari,
  Naam sada shubh mangalkari.
  Paath karai jo nitya Chalisa,
  Tehi par kripa karahin Gaurisha.
  
  ॥ Doha ॥
  Santsharan ko tanay hoon,
  Kulpati Mishra sunam.
  Haridwar mandal basoon,
  Dham Haripur gram.
  Unnees sau pichanbe san ki,
  Shravan shukla maas.
  Chalisa rachna kiyau,
  Tav charnan ko das.
meaning:
॥ Doha ॥
  Sir navai Baglamukhi, likhun Chalisa aaj.
  Bowing my head to Mother Baglamukhi, I write this Chalisa today.
  Kripa karahu mopar sada, puran ho mam kaaj.
  Bestow your grace upon me always, and may my tasks be fulfilled.
  
  ॥ Chaupai ॥
  Jai Jai Jai Shri Bagla Mata,
  Victory, victory, victory to Mother Bagla,
  Aadishakti sab jag ki trata.
  Primal energy and savior of the entire universe.
  Bagla sam tab aanan Mata,
  Mother, your face is like that of a crane (Bagla),
  Ehi te bhayau naam vikhyata.
  For this reason, this name of yours became famous.
  Shashi lalaat kundal chhavi nyari,
  The moon on your forehead and your earrings have a unique beauty,
  Astuti karahin dev nar-nari.
  Gods, men, and women all sing your praises.
  Peetvasan tan par tav rajai,
  Yellow garments look magnificent on your body,
  Haathahin mudgar gada virajai.
  In your hands, a club (Mudgar) and mace (Gada) are seated.
  Teen nayan gal champak mala,
  You have three eyes and a garland of Champak flowers around your neck,
  Amit tej prakatat hai bhala.
  Limitless radiance is emanating from your forehead.
  Ratna-jatit sinhasan sohai,
  Your jewel-studded throne looks splendid,
  Shobha nirakhi sakal jan mohai.
  Seeing this beauty, all people are mesmerized.
  Aasan peetvarna maharani,
  O Great Queen, your seat is yellow in color,
  Bhaktan ki tum ho vardani.
  You are the one who grants boons to devotees.
  Peetabhushan peetahin chandan,
  Wearing yellow ornaments and yellow sandalwood paste,
  Sur nar naag karat sab vandan.
  Gods, humans, and Nagas all worship you.
  Ehi vidhi dhyan hriday mein rakhai,
  He who keeps this meditation in his heart,
  Ved puran sant as bhakhai.
  The Vedas, Puranas, and Saints describe you thus.
  Ab puja vidhi karaun prakasha,
  Now I will explain the method of worship,
  Jaake kiye hot dukh-nasha.
  By doing which, all sorrows are destroyed.
  Prathamahin peet dhwaja faharavai,
  First, hoist a yellow flag,
  Peetvasan devi pahiravai.
  And dress the Goddess in yellow clothes.
  Kunkum akshat modak besan,
  Offer Kumkum, rice, and besan (gram flour) sweets,
  Abir gulal supari chandan.
  Abir, Gulal, betel nut, and sandalwood.
  Malya haridra aru phal pana,
  Garlands, turmeric, fruits, and betel leaves,
  Sabahin chadhai dharai ur dhyana.
  Offer all these while keeping your heart focused on meditation.
  Dhoop deep karpur ki bati,
  Light incense, lamps, and a camphor wick,
  Prem-sahit tab karai aarti.
  And then perform the Aarti with love.
  Astuti karai haath dou jore,
  Pray with folded hands,
  Puravahu matu manorath more.
  O Mother, fulfill my desires.
  Matu bhagati tab sab sukh khani,
  O Mother, your devotion is the mine of all happiness,
  Karahun kripa mopar janjani.
  Show grace upon me, knowing me as your servant.
  Trividh taap sab dukh nashavahu,
  Destroy all the three types of suffering and sorrows,
  Timir mitakar gyan badhavahu.
  Remove the darkness and increase my knowledge.
  Baar-baar main binavahu tohin,
  I pray to you again and again,
  Aviral bhagati gyan do mohin.
  Grant me uninterrupted devotion and wisdom.
  Pujanant mein havan karavai,
  Performing Havan at the end of worship,
  Sa nar manvanchhit phal pavai.
  That person receives the desired fruits.
  Sarshap hom karai jo koi,
  Whoever performs the Havan with mustard seeds,
  Taake vash sacharachar hoi.
  The entire universe comes under his control.
  Til tandul sang ksheer miravai,
  Mixing sesame, rice, and milk pudding (Kheer),
  Bhagati prem se havan karavai.
  Perform the Havan with devotion and love.
  Dukh daridra vyapai nahin soi,
  Suffering and poverty will not affect that person,
  Nishchay sukh-sampatti sab hoi.
  Surely, all happiness and wealth will be attained.
  Phool ashok havan jo karai,
  Whoever performs the Havan with Ashoka flowers,
  Taake grih sukh-sampatti bharai.
  His home will be filled with happiness and wealth.
  Phal semar ka hom karijai,
  If the Havan is done with Semar fruits,
  Nishchay vaako ripu sab chhijai.
  Surely, all his enemies will be destroyed.
  Guggul ghrit homai jo koi,
  Whoever performs the Havan with Guggul and Ghee,
  Tehi ke vash mein raja hoi.
  Even a King will come under his control.
  Guggul til sang hom karavai,
  Performing the Havan with Guggul and sesame,
  Taako sakal bandh kat javai.
  All his bonds will be cut off.
  Beelakshar ka paath jo karahin,
  Whoever recites the Beelakshar (seed letters),
  Beej mantra tumharo uchharahin.
  And chants your seed mantra (Beej Mantra),
  Ek maas nishi jo kar japa,
  Whoever chants this at night for one month,
  Tehi kar mitat sakal santapa.
  All his troubles will be erased.
  Ghar ki shuddh bhumi jahan hoi,
  Where the land of the house is pure,
  Sadhka jaap karai tahan soi.
  The seeker should perform the Japa there.
  Sei ichchhit phal nishchay pavai,
  He will definitely receive the desired fruits,
  Yaamai nahin kadu sanshay lavai.
  Do not have any doubt about this.
  Athava teer nadi ke jaai,
  Or else, go to the river bank,
  Sadhak jaap karai man laai.
  And the seeker should chant with a focused mind.
  Das sahasra jap karai jo koi,
  Whoever performs ten thousand chants,
  Sak kaaj tehi kar sidhi hoi.
  All his tasks will be accomplished successfully.
  Jaap karai jo lakshahin bara,
  Whoever performs the Japa one hundred thousand times,
  Taakar hoy suyeshvistara.
  His fame will spread far and wide.
  Jo tav naam japai man laai,
  Whoever chants your name with a focused mind,
  Alpakaal mahan ripuhin nasai.
  In a short time, he will destroy his enemies.
  Saptaratri jo paapahin nama,
  Whoever chants your name for seven nights,
  Vaako puran ho sab kama.
  All his tasks will be fulfilled.
  Nav din jaap kare jo koi,
  Whoever chants for nine days,
  Vyadhi rahit taakar tan hoi.
  His body will become free from diseases.
  Dhyan karai jo bandhya nari,
  If a childless woman meditates on you,
  Pavai putradik phal chari.
  She receives the blessing of a son and other fruits.
  Pratah sayam aru madhyana,
  Morning, evening, and noon,
  Dhare dhyan hovakalyana.
  Meditate and attain welfare.
  Kahan lagi mahima kahaun tihari,
  How much can I praise your glory,
  Naam sada shubh mangalkari.
  Your name is always auspicious and beneficial.
  Paath karai jo nitya Chalisa,
  Whoever recites this Chalisa daily,
  Tehi par kripa karahin Gaurisha.
  Upon him, Lord Shiva (Gaurisha) bestows grace.
  
  ॥ Doha ॥
  Santsharan ko tanay hoon,
  I am the son of Santsharan,
  Kulpati Mishra sunam.
  My name is Kulpati Mishra.
  Haridwar mandal basoon,
  I reside in the Haridwar district,
  Dham Haripur gram.
  In the village named Haripur.
  Unnees sau pichanbe san ki,
  In the year nineteen ninety-five (1995),
  Shravan shukla maas.
  In the month of Shravan Shukla.
  Chalisa rachna kiyau,
  I composed this Chalisa,
  Tav charnan ko das.
  I am a servant at your feet.

faq.q1: What is the primary purpose of reciting the Baglamukhi Chalisa?
faq.a1: Maa Baglamukhi is the Goddess of 'Stambhan' (to paralyze or stop). This Chalisa is recited to gain victory over enemies, protection from evil eyes, success in legal matters, and the establishment of truth.
faq.q2: What is the best day to recite the Baglamukhi Chalisa?
faq.a2: Tuesday is considered the most powerful and auspicious day for the worship of Maa Baglamukhi.
faq.q3: Can any ordinary person recite the Baglamukhi Chalisa?
faq.a3: Yes, ordinary devotees can recite it with faith for their own protection and to boost self-confidence. The intent must remain pure and free from malice.
faq.q4: Is any special ritual required to read it?
faq.a4: For the standard recitation of the Chalisa, no complex tantra or difficult rituals are required. You can recite it while wearing yellow clothes and maintaining full purity.
faq.q5: Does it help in enhancing the power of speech?
faq.a5: Yes, Maa Baglamukhi is also known as the Goddess of 'Vak Siddhi' (perfection in speech). Reciting her Chalisa brings influence and clarity to one's speech.
